content:
I recently unlocked Covenant Transcription to add substats to the various covenant pieces. I see that you can reroll the stat lines themselves, and each time you do this the line gets a random percentage bar determining that lines effectiveness. You can also lock these lines so they won't be rerolled.

My suggestion is that why can't we also reroll the percentage bar determining the effectiveness of each stat? If you get the 3 stats you like, I think you should be able to reroll that bar to reduce the rng a bit. The cost could be similar or the same as rerolling the line itself, increasing if you lock a line so no changes occur. Going for perfect lines would still be a big investment with those costs but more approachable.

thread_title: ✅「已回答」塔薇試玩開第二鑰令選門扉的答案選完一次後會卡住
